_comment: Registry of all Solo Dev Suite child skills. Orchestrator reads this to route and to build the phase-aware menu. Edit this file when adding/removing/retiring a child skill. Keep entries alphabetized by 'name' for sanity.

children.name: adr-generator
children.description: Generates and maintains Architecture Decision Records in the Michael Nygard format -- numbered Markdown docs with context, decision, consequences, alternatives. Supports status lifecycle (proposed/accepted/superseded/deprecated) and bidirectional supersession tracking.

children.name: auto-docs
children.description: Generates and maintains project documentation (README, SETUP, ARCHITECTURE, CHANGELOG) by pulling from profile + sibling sidecars. Preserved regions survive regeneration. Re-runnable at every milestone.

children.name: integration-mapper
children.description: Maps every third-party service with 3-dimensional risk rating (blast radius, pricing exposure, deprecation risk), fallback plans, staleness detection, and unhedged bet warnings. Owns profile.third_party_services with lean risk rollup mirror.

children.name: launch-readiness
children.description: Pre-ship gate with 9-category tailored checklist (auth, error handling, legal, payment, email, performance, SEO, mobile, monitoring) gated on blocker resolution. Dynamically tailors items by project type, business model, pricing strategy, and third-party services. Nothing ships until blockers are green and sign-off is recorded.

children.name: mvp-scope-guardian
children.description: Sorts every feature into 4 buckets (LAUNCH-BLOCKING / POST-LAUNCH V1.1 / PARKING LOT / WON'T BUILD) with effort/impact scoring, produces locked MVP docs, and provides ongoing scope creep detection with recorded-NO rationale.

children.name: saas-pricing-architect
children.description: Designs versioned pricing (strategy/tiers/value-metric/annual-discount/launch-strategy) with competitive anchoring enforced, mirrors active pricing to profile.pricing_model, and produces PRICING.md with Stripe wiring hints. Iteration appends new versions; prior versions archived with timestamps.

children.name: security-audit
children.description: Pre-ship security pass with 10-category tailored checklist (secrets, auth, input, transport, API, frontend, infra, deps, data, integrations), stack-aware items, accepted-risk with required rationale, and sign-off gated on criticals+highs.

children.name: sprint-planner
children.description: Converts a backlog into realistic solo-dev sprints with honest capacity math (buffer for day job + family), velocity tracking, launch countdown (red/yellow/green), and incomplete-item return to backlog.
triggers: am I on track for launch

children.name: tech-debt-register
children.description: Logs, categorizes, and prioritizes tech debt with 9 categories, impact/effort/urgency scoring, priority-ranked pay-down recommendations, and status lifecycle (open/paid-down/accepted). Not a shame exercise -- a managed backlog.
triggers: what should I pay down next

children.name: testing-strategy
children.description: Generates a right-sized, stack-aware testing strategy with 4 categories (unit/integration/e2e/manual), effort splits, explicit skips, CI gates, review cadence with staleness detection, and iterable design.
